name: Abadar's Avenger
source: Pathfinder Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Player's Guide
description: Hao Jin really has some nerve for a supposed disciple of Abadar.

name: Able Carter
description: You worked for many years as a hauler within Geb, either on your own or with a larger operation that shipped goods across Geb's ancient roads.

name: Academic Scion
description: You were born to famed scholars of magic; your childhood was filled with old books, ink-stained lesson papers, and casual dinners with your parents' brilliant colleagues.

name: Academy Dropout
description: You were enrolled at a prestigious magical academy, but you've since dropped out.

name: Acolyte
description: You spent your early days in a religious monastery or cloister.

name: Acrobat
description: In a circus or on the streets, you earned your pay by performing as an acrobat.

name: Acupuncturist
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originYou've studied qi and its abilities to heal the body through assessment and regulating qi flow.

name: Aerialist
description: Experienced with trapezes, aerial silks, and hoops, your skill is in performing death-defying stunts high above the ground.

name: Aiudara Seeker
description: [Legacy - Age of Ashes] The aiudara of Alseta's Ring have become more well known, and you are interested in learning more about them.

name: Alkenstar Outlaw
description: You're an outlaw whose first crime was stealing the guns from Alkenstar's Gunworks which allowed you to commence a crime spree of epic proportions.

name: Alkenstar Sojourner
description: You came to Alkenstar because you heard they had guns, but you stayed because of the atmosphere.

name: Alkenstar Tinker
description: Prerequisite Region - Impossible Lands Your dedication to the scientific inquiry of your native Alkenstar provides great insight into mechanical and chemical innovation.

name: Alloysmith
description: Blacksmithing might be an ancient profession, but you are its cutting edge.

name: Almas Clerk
source: Pathfinder Blog: Pathfinder Society Year 4 Rule Updates
description: You worked as a clerk at the Golden Cathedral of Almas in Andoran.

name: Always Chosen Last
description: When you were young, for whatever reason, you were always the last pick when it came to choosing teammates for a game, selecting someone for an important job, or the final person in your social circle to achieve an important milestone.

name: Amateur Director
description: You grew up a child of the theater.

name: Amnesiac
loreSkill: GM choice free skill boost Lore
description: Your background is...

name: Animal Whisperer
description: You have always felt a connection to animals, and it was only a small leap to learn to train them.

name: Animal Wrangler
description: You have a long history of working with large circus animals for the Celestial Menagerie, such as performing in an animal act, jostling animals back into their cages, or even sweeping dung out of squalid pens.

name: Anti-Magical
description: Magic has never worked quite right around you.

name: Anti-Tech Activist
description: You've seen the sorts of things that technology brings—polluted environments, workers put out of their jobs or horribly injured, and the slow erosion of society—and you've vowed to inform the larger world of these ills.

name: Archaeologist
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You've excavated enough sites to know that ancient civilizations aren't lost; they're merely buried and waiting for the right scholar to unearth them and tell their story.

name: Art Tutor
description: Art has always been important to you.

name: Artisan
description: As an apprentice, you practiced a particular form of building or crafting, developing a specialized skill.

name: Artist
description: Your art is your greatest passion, whatever form it takes.

name: Aspiring Free-Captain
description: Prerequisite Region - High Seas You seek to join the Free Captains of the Shackles and have learned everything you need to know about sailing and bossing people around.

name: Aspiring River Monarch
description: Prerequisite Region - Broken Lands New realms rise constantly in the River Kingdoms, and you intend to lead one of them.

name: Astrologer
description: Astrologers look to the stars for signs and portents, using their positions in the heavens to chart courses for those living beneath them.

name: Astrological Augur
description: During your formative years, you learned the stars are a gateway to mystical power or glimpses into the future.

name: Attention Addict
source: Pathfinder Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Player's Guide
description: A roaring crowd chanting your name.

name: Atteran Rancher
description: Prerequisite Region - Old Cheliax You grew up breeding and training the famous horses of the Atteran Ranches in northern Nidal.

name: Awful Scab
description: Prior to the Evisceration of 4707, the district of V'drysha was a lovely borough on the southern edge of Ecanus.

name: Bachuan Revolutionary
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Bachuan originYour heart yearns for change and burns for your people.

name: Back-Alley Doctor
description: You're the medic many turn to when a more official clinic or healer might not be available.

name: Badlands Scout
source: Pathfinder Triumph of The Tusk Player's Guide
description: You're accustomed to the desolate wilds of Belkzen and able to blend into the sparse shadows of craggy rocks and quench your thirst with drops of water.

name: Bandit
description: Your past includes no small amount of rural banditry, robbing travelers on the road and scraping by.

name: Banished Brighite
source: Pathfinder Outlaws of Alkenstar Player's Guide
description: Once, you were a dedicated and important priest of Brigh, goddess of clockwork and invention, based out of the largest church to your deity, the Temple of Brigh in Alkenstar.

name: Banished Celestial
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You were once something supernatural—a heavenly agent, grim reaper, immortal phoenix, or demonic tyrant.

name: Barber
description: Haircuts, dentistry, bloodletting, and surgery—if it takes a steady hand and a razor, you can do it.

name: Barkeep
description: You have five specialties: hefting barrels, drinking, polishing steins, drinking, and drinking.

name: Barker
description: You're skilled at shouting to catch and keep the attention of passersby.

name: Barrister
description: Piles of legal manuals, stern teachers, and experience in the courtroom have instructed you in legal matters.

name: Beast Blessed
description: You once freed a magical beast from captivity and, whether it was intentional or a byproduct of another action, the grateful creature bestowed a blessing of freedom upon you.

name: Bekyar Restorer
description: Prerequisite Region - Mwangi Expanse Though many Bekyars worship demons, you seek to pave a different path for yourself and your kindred, while also attempting to change other Mwangi's treatment of your culture.

name: Belkzen Anthropologist
source: Pathfinder Triumph of The Tusk Player's Guide
description: Belkzen has a long, storied history, but much of it has been erased by time, conflict, and the deliberate cruelty of those who wished to destroy records of the past.

name: Belkzen Slayer
description: Prerequisite Region - Eye of Dread You are a fearsome warrior from the Hold of Belkzen, and your clan counts on you for support, counsel, and defense.

name: Bellflower Agent
description: Prerequisite Region - Old Cheliax You joined a secret society dedicated to freeing halfling slaves, most likely from the cruelty of Chelish reign.

name: Bibliophile
description: You love few things more than a good book, and as a result, Odd Stories is your favorite shop in Otari.

name: Black Market Smuggler
description: Prerequisite Region - Golden Road You know how to work the less-than-legal side of the region's markets and know how to slip contraband past the authorities.

name: Blessed
description: You have been blessed by a divinity.

name: Blight Survivor
description: Centuries ago, the elven witch Silisifex played an important role in the fight against Treerazer.

name: Blow-In
description: You never expected to join a circus, but you were looking for a good place to lie low for reasons of your own.

name: Bonuwat Wavetouched
description: Prerequisite Region - Mwangi Expanse You are a child of the Bonuwat people, and the sea's salt flows through your veins.

name: Bookish Providence
description: You have always been interested in knowledge and learned to read from a very young age.

name: Bookkeeper
description: You ran the numbers on a large farm, for a merchant's endeavors, or with a major guild in the city.

name: Borderlands Pioneer
description: You have long lived along the southern border of Brevoy, in the shadow of the wilderness known as the Stolen Lands.

name: Bounty Hunter
description: Bringing in lawbreakers lined your pockets.

name: Brevic Noble
description: You claim a tangential but legitimate connection to one of Brevoy's noble families.

name: Brevic Outcast
description: One of your parents was a member of one of the great families of Brevoy, perhaps even of the line of Rogarvia itself.

name: Bright Lion
description: Prerequisite Region - Mwangi Expanse You are a member of the Bright Lions and seek to overthrow the tyrannical reign of Walkena and free Mzali from his cruel whims.

name: Broken Tusk Recruiter
source: Pathfinder Quest for the Frozen Flame Player's Guide
description: Your gifted tongue, friendly demeanor, and deep knowledge of Broken Tusk culture and traditions make you an ideal recruiter for new followers.

name: Bully or Baiter?
description: Force, be it as a physical presence or as a strength of personality, has long given bullies power over others in their groups.

name: Butcher
description: You've spent uncounted hours walking up and down crowded and noisy circus stands, inventing innovative means to sell refreshments, food, and novelties at inflated prices.

name: Cannoneer
description: You served as a crewmate aboard a military vessel or pirate ship and were responsible for the use and maintenance of the ship's cannons.

name: Cathedral Child
source: Pathfinder Seven Dooms for Sandpoint Player's Guide
description: You grew up in the shadow of the Sandpoint Cathedral, perhaps literally.

name: Charlatan
description: You traveled from place to place, peddling false fortunes and snake oil in one town, pretending to be royalty in exile to seduce a wealthy heir in the next.

name: Chelish Rebel
description: Prerequisite Region - Old Cheliax You joined the fight against House Thrune.

name: Child Of Notoriety
source: Pathfinder Sky King's Tomb Player's Guide
description: One or more of your ancestors committed a grave atrocity, and even though you've tried to live your own life, your family's grim past looms over you like a relentless shadow.

name: Child of the Colony
source: Pathfinder Shades of Blood Player's Guide
description: Talmandor's Bounty's first year was fraught with hardship and peril, and many of the original settlers—including your parents—returned to the mainland at the earliest opportunity.

name: Child of the Puddles
description: Prerequisite Region - Absalom and Starstone Isle You grew up in the soggy, squalid quarter of Absalom known as the Puddles.

name: Child of the Twin Village
description: You were born in a village where everyone has a twin with a special link.

name: Child of Westcrown
description: Prerequisite Region - Old Cheliax Whether you come from Westcrown or elsewhere, you hold the values of pre-Thrune Cheliax dear.

name: Chosen One
description: Your birth has fulfilled a prediction, and people close to you are counting on you to do great things.

name: Circuit Judge
description: You're a circuit judge, a courtroom on horseback who serves a group of communities out in the Mana Wastes or a similar backwoods region.

name: Circus Born
description: The itinerant life of a traveling circus performer is nothing new to you; you were born and raised in the circus.

name: Clan Associate
source: Pathfinder Sky King's Tomb Player's Guide
description: You already have a close connection to Clan Tolorr, such as having been born into the clan, worked as an esteemed contractor for them, or married into the clan (even if you chose to retain your prior clan affiliation).

name: Clockfighter
description: While others choose to use their engineering ability to heal the injured or make brilliant innovations, you've used your skill to repair and modify clockwork constructs that battle in gladiatorial combat.

name: Clockwork Researcher
description: New forms of clockwork technology are incredibly interesting to you, and you've been studying examples of them to see where else they might be best put to use.

name: Close Ties
source: Pathfinder Season of Ghosts Player's Guide
description: You've forged a close friendship with one of Willowshore's notable citizens, and you have a long tradition of sharing tea with each other while chatting about shared interests, plans for the future, town gossip, or other matters of note.

name: Clown
description: Although you've spent time in greasepaint and colorful clothing to amuse crowds, your skills with buffoonery and physical comedy are exceptional whether or not you're in costume.

name: Codebreaker
description: Whether you're employed by a military organization to decipher coded messages sent by enemy factions or work independently to crack an enigma created by a past civilization, you have a head for patterns and linguistics.

name: Company Agent
source: Pathfinder Shades of Blood Player's Guide
description: When the Bountiful Venture Company first invested in the colony of Talmandor's Bounty, the backers expected to see a return on their investment.

name: Concordance Researcher
description: Tasked by the Concordance of Elements to research a variety of enigmatic planar phenomena, you've acquired very specific knowledge about the planes and the interactions between them.

name: Concordance Scout
description: You were hired by the Concordance of Elements to seek out rumors of planar breaches or other evidence of planar imbalances.

name: Conservator
source: Pathfinder Sky King's Tomb Player's Guide
description: Some history survives only so long as its physical remains do.

name: Construction Occultist
description: You helped to build and design buildings and public works on behalf of Geb's architectural faction, the Builders League.

name: Convocation Scout
description: The Convocation is the biggest, most anticipated academic event in recent years.

name: Cook
description: You grew up in the kitchens of a tavern or other dining establishment and excelled there, becoming an exceptional cook.

name: Corpse Stitcher
description: The number of zombies working across Geb as farmhands, laborers, or shambling soldiers seems nearly uncountable.

name: Courier
description: In your youth, you earned coin running messages for persons of wealth and influence, darting through crowded city streets.

name: Criminal
description: As an unscrupulous independent or as a member of an underworld organization, you lived a life of crime.

name: Crown of Chaos
description: Your life was one of tumult and mayhem, but you don't see this as a bad thing.

name: Crystal Healer
description: Mineral formations can be beautiful things, sparkling and arrayed in geometric configurations.

name: Cultist
description: You were (or still are) a member of a cult whose rites may involve sacred dances to ensure a strong harvest or dire rituals that call upon dark powers.

name: Curandero
description: You learned the healing arts of your community wielding your ceremonial chonta, a tool you carved yourself and imbued with sacred oils and herbs.

name: Curious Apprentice
source: Pathfinder Seven Dooms for Sandpoint Player's Guide
description: Sandpoint features a wide array of shops and services.

name: Cursed
description: You are the victim of a personal or hereditary curse.

name: Cursed Family
description: Prerequisite Region - Eye of Dread Rumors abound that your family is cursed.

name: Dauntless
description: As a child, you chose to face each of your deepest fears and, time and again, emerged victorious.

name: Deckhand
description: The rolling waves of the high seas, the constant sway of the deck underfoot, and the creaking heights of a ship's rigging are as familiar to you as solid ground.

name: Dedicated Delver
source: Pathfinder Sky King's Tomb Player's Guide
description: Filled with predators, pitfalls, and other perils, the Darklands rightfully scares off most travelers.

name: Deep-Sea Diver
description: The sapphire depths of the seas and the mysteries they hold beneath their surface have always piqued your interest.

name: Demon Hunted
description: During the first war against Tanglebriar, when the elves returned to Kyonin to fight against Treerazer, many heroes rose to prominence while reclaiming their ancestral homeland from demonic occupation.

name: Demon Slayer
description: For over a century, Mendev led a multinational coalition against ever-growing abyssal invaders in the Worldwound, and the Pathfinder Society aided in the so-called Fifth Crusade that ultimately sealed the planar rift and defeated its demon armies.

name: Dendrologist
description: Trees grow in every biome, and your awe at their ability to conquer terrain has inspired deeper study into their workings.

name: Deputy
description: While your life may have taken some twists and turns in the intervening years, you were once deputized as the lawful protector of a community.

name: Desert Tracker
description: Prerequisite Region - Golden Road You're at home blazing trails in the burning sands, and you made a living guiding or following creatures in the desert.

name: Detective
description: You solved crimes as a police inspector or took jobs for wealthy clients as a private investigator.

name: Diobel Pearl Diver
description: Prerequisite Region - Absalom and Starstone Isle You spent a portion of your youth diving and gathering precious pearls under the attentive eyes of Kortos Consortium merchants.

name: Discarded Duplicate
description: Someone created you for a specific purpose.

name: Disciple of the Gear
description: While many regard science and faith as incompatible, you believe scientific advancement is your deity's will.

name: Doomcaller
description: In the stars you see not guidance or wisdom but a twinkling door to the impending end of all things.

name: Dragon Scholar
source: Pathfinder Age of Ashes Player's Guide
description: Dragons have fascinated you for as long as you can remember.

name: Dreamer of the Verdant Moon
description: You spent your early days in the aftermath of one of the great ravenings.

name: Dreams of Vengeance
description: You've known strife your whole life, whether on the battlefield, in the arena, or simply living your day-to-day life.

name: Driver
description: You live behind the controls of a vehicle, and can handle anything the road or waves and sky can throw at you.

name: Droskari Disciple
source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City
description: You grew up in the church of the Dark Smith, where you learned the value of hard work and achieving vocational mastery.

name: Eager Scofflaw
source: Pathfinder Seven Dooms for Sandpoint Player's Guide
description: You never met a law that didn't deserve testing, in theory at least and often in practice.

name: Eagle Hunter
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You're a hunter bonded to an eagle animal companion since youth.

name: Early Explorer
description: In the past decade, the Pathfinder Society has clashed with demonic armies, meddled in politics, and more, but you joined the organization before everything seemed so complicated.

name: Eclectic Scholar
source: Pathfinder Sky King's Tomb Player's Guide
description: Understanding history isn't just about translating old laws and reading about who invaded whom; it's also packed with magical outbursts, extraplanar interventions, and unexplained oddities not yet understood by modern science.

name: Eclipseborn
description: You were born at the exact moment of a solar or lunar eclipse.

name: Eidolon Contact
description: You've come into contact with a disembodied being of magical essence known as an eidolon.

name: Eldritch Anatomist
description: You're a trained physician who can ably tend wounds of many kinds.

name: Elementally Infused
description: You were exposed to a strong burst of elemental essence originating directly from an elemental plane, most likely caused by a planar breach.

name: Emancipated
source: Pathfinder Age of Ashes Player's Guide
description: Until recently, the nation of Ravounel was part of the larger nation of Cheliax, where the church of Asmodeus is the law and slaves are traded freely in the open market.

name: Emissary
description: As a diplomat or messenger, you traveled to lands far and wide.

name: Empty Hand Loyalist
source: Pathfinder Triumph of The Tusk Player's Guide
description: The orcs have had a long history of violence that brings some orcs pride, but for you it's a mark of shame.

name: Empty Whispers
description: You knew someone once, and now you know only a life stitched together and healed over, nary even a scar remaining.

name: Energy Scarred
loreSkill: Lore associated with the chosen energy Lore
description: Exposure to a significant magical event overloaded you with magical energy.

name: Entertainer
description: Through an education in the arts or sheer dogged practice, you learned to entertain crowds.

name: Ex-Con Token Guard
loreSkill: Legal Lore or Underworld Lore Lore
source: Pathfinder Agents of Edgewatch Player's Guide
description: Not everyone starts life on easy street-your own experience is testament to that.

name: Ex-Mendevian Crusader
source: Pathfinder Quest for the Frozen Flame Player's Guide
description: When the Great Quake rumbled across the eastern lands and opened the rift that southerners called "the Worldwound," you answered the call to arms to fight back the demonic hordes.

name: Faction Opportunist
description: As the Pathfinder Society's influence has grown, so too did many of its factions become wealthier and more powerful.

name: False Medium
description: There are people in this world who possess the ability to pierce the veil between the world of the living and the world of the dead, allowing them to communicate with spirits.

name: Farmhand
description: With a strong back and an understanding of seasonal cycles, you tilled the land and tended crops.

name: Farmsteader
description: You built your house using wood from the trees surrounding it.

name: Fated Rival
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You are bound in an adversarial relationship with another person or creature.

name: Favored
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You're a trained, elegant artist or entertainer for the upper echelon of society.

name: Feral Child
description: You spent your youth in the wilderness, living close to or perhaps raised by animals.

name: Fey Friend
source: Pathfinder Wardens of Wildwood Player's Guide
description: Many grow up hearing cautionary tales of mischievous fey, and with good reason: from sprites' pranks to gremlins' sabotage to redcaps' outright lethality, fey pose a real danger to the unwary.

name: Feybound
description: You have spent time in the First World or another realm of the fey and aren't entirely the same person you were before.

name: Field Medic
description: In the chaotic rush of battle, you learned to adapt to rapidly changing conditions as you administered to battle casualties.

name: Fiendbreaking Pilgrim
description: Soon after the elves returned to stop Treerazer's corruption of Kyonin, word spread across the globe, reaching the distant elven nation of Jinin in the heart of Tian Xia.

name: Fightbreaker
description: You have a knack for picking up on simmering tensions and calming frayed nerves.

name: Finadar Leshy
source: Pathfinder Society Scenario #1-15: The Blooming Catastrophe
description: Prerequisites Leshy ancestry You are a leshy from Finadar Forest, originally created under the corruption of a cyclopean monolith.

name: Final Blade Survivor
description: Prerequisite Region - Shining Kingdoms You fell prey to the whims of the Galtan mob and were scheduled for execution by , but through skill-or sheer luck-you managed to talk your way out of it.

name: Fire Warden
description: Whether you fought against fires in the wilderness or in crowded city streets, you've had your fair share of dealing with uncontrolled flames.

name: Firebrand Follower
description: You were once rescued or liberated from a hopeless situation by a group of Firebrands, and you have since aspired to become a Firebrand to continue their legacy.

name: Fireworks Performer
description: Few celebrations in Tian Xia are complete without a show of fireworks, and your job is to make sure they go off without a hitch.

name: Fogfen Tale-Teller
description: You know there are monstrous things out in the swamp known as Fogfen; you've seen these things through the mist, gliding through the murky water and heaving themselves over sodden bits of land.

name: Folklore Enthusiast
source: Pathfinder Season of Ghosts Player's Guide
description: Willowshore is a small town in a rural part of Shenmen, but that doesn't exempt it from the world of the strange and unexplained.

name: Food Trader
description: In your past, you accompanied caravans, ships, or both hauling foodstuffs out of Geb for export.

name: Foreign Diplomat
source: Pathfinder Triumph of The Tusk Player's Guide
description: You have traveled a long way to be here, using your keen listening skills and careful words to make alliances that benefit your people and surgically sever ties that have become strained.

name: Former Aspis Agent
description: For more than a century, the Pathfinder Society has clashed with the avaricious and underhanded Aspis Consortium, and several years ago the Society dealt its rival a decisive blow.

name: Fortune Teller
description: The strands of fate are clear to you, as you have learned many traditional forms by which laypeople can divine the future.

name: Framed in Ferrous Quarter
source: Pathfinder Outlaws of Alkenstar Player's Guide
description: Everyone knows that Ferrous Quarter isn't exactly the nicest part of Alkenstar.

name: Free Spirit
description: You've always lived your life straying from the path laid before you.

name: Freed Slave of Absalom
description: Prerequisite Region - Absalom and Starstone Isle As a recently freed slave in Absalom, you belong to a new, close-knit social class at the heart of the city's most important trades.

name: Friend of Greensteeples
loreSkill: <Lore about a narrow category of creatures> Lore
source: Pathfinder Blog: Pathfinder Society Year 4 Rule Updates
description: You're a good friend of Benedet, the majordomo of Greensteeples Manor in Egorian, Cheliax.

name: Friendly Darkmoon Kobold
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Crown of the Kobold King
description: It has taken time, but over the years, you've managed to find a place among the citizens of Falcon's Hollow.

name: Gambler
description: The thrill of the win drew you into games of chance.

name: Geb Crusader
description: Prerequisite Region - Impossible Lands You grew up considering the existence of the undead nation of Geb an atrocity and trained to one day take part in destroying it and putting its vile inhabitants to their final rest.

name: Genie-Blessed
description: You've sought out a powerful genie and requested their blessing, hoping to increase your fortune.

name: Ghostwriter
description: While you enjoy scholastic success, you lack either academic aspirations or academic integrity, and you instead conduct your illicit business of ghostwriting at your school.

name: Gladiator
description: The bloody games of the arena taught you the art of combat.

name: Gloriana's Fixer
source: Pathfinder Blog: Pathfinder Society Year 4 Rule Updates
description: You used to run certain "errands" for Gloriana Morilla, a close confidante of Grand Princess Eutropia Stavian, the ruler of Taldor.

name: Goblinblood Orphan
description: Prerequisite Region - Old Cheliax Your family, whether goblin, hobgoblin, or human, died in the Goblinblood Wars.

name: Godless Graycloak
source: Pathfinder Agents of Edgewatch Player's Guide
description: You were a member of a church once, and you saw some things among Absalom's religious elite that put you off piety for good.

name: Gold Falls Regular
source: Pathfinder Blog: Pathfinder Society Year 4 Rule Updates
description: You've long been a regular of Gold Falls Inn, a tavern located near Droskar's Crag in the Darkmoon Vale region of Andoran.

name: Goldhand Arms Dealer
description: You're a dwarven agent of the Goldhand Lodge, a collection of dwarven merchants based out of Dongun Hold who seeks to sell guns far and wide.

name: Gossip
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Everyone has a nosy auntie, a talkative uncle, or a gossiping relative.

name: Grand Council Bureaucrat
description: Prerequisite Region - Absalom and Starstone Isle You spent years working as a clerk to a functionary in Absalom's government.

name: Grave Robber
description: Resurrectionist.

name: Green Faith Pilgrim
source: Pathfinder Wardens of Wildwood Player's Guide
description: You are an adherent of the Green Faith, striving to bring harmony between nature and civilization.

name: Grizzled Muckrucker
loreSkill: Labor Lore or Underworld Lore Lore
source: Pathfinder Agents of Edgewatch Player's Guide
description: You've served on the Muckruckers, the unofficial guards of the flooded Puddles district.

name: Guard
description: You served in the guard, out of either patriotism or the need for coin.

name: Guest of Sedeq Lodge
loreSkill: <Choice of Genie Lore or Sarenrae Lore> Lore
source: Pathfinder Blog: Pathfinder Society Year 4 Rule Updates
description: Either as a guest, event staff, or part of the construction crew, you spent a significant stretch of time at the Pathfinder Society's new lodge in Sedeq.

name: Gunsmith
description: From a young age, you apprenticed to an experienced gunsmith and over time your skill and knowledge rose to match that of your master.

name: Hammered by Fate
description: Your life has been difficult, in no small part due to the influence of all things fiendish in your past.

name: Harbor Guard Moonlighter
loreSkill: Sailing Lore or Hunting Lore Lore
source: Pathfinder Agents of Edgewatch Player's Guide
description: The Harbor Guard isn't known for being the most honorable precinct in town.

name: Harrow-Chosen
source: Pathfinder #192: Worst of All Possible Worlds
description: Unbeknownst to you, a powerful divination has confirmed that you're destined for greatness.

name: Harrow-Led
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven
description: You were the subject of a harrow reading at a pivotal point in your life, such as on an important birthday, or upon reaching adulthood.

name: Haunted
loreSkill: GM choice free skill boost Lore
description: You are followed by a spirit or entity, either from childhood or since a momentous event.

name: Haunted Citizen
description: You grew up in a region where undead lurk everywhere.

name: Haunting Vision
source: Pathfinder Age of Ashes Player's Guide
description: You've been haunted by frightening dreams of fires your whole life.

name: Hellknight Historian
source: Pathfinder Age of Ashes Player's Guide
description: The various Hellknight Orders intrigue you, whether you seek to become one of their number yourself, wish to oppose their goals at every turn, or are merely inspired by or curious to learn more about them.

name: Herbalist
description: As a formally trained apothecary or a rural practitioner of folk medicine, you learned the healing properties of various herbs.

name: Hermean Expatriate
description: Prerequisite Region - High Seas You have been exiled from Hermea, perhaps of your own accord or perhaps because you didn't measure up.

name: Hermean Heritor
description: [Legacy - Age of Ashes] With the restrictions on Hermean citizenship lifted, you may have fled the city of Promise or have spent some of your childhood in the company of someone who did.

name: Hermit
description: In an isolated place—like a cave, remote oasis, or secluded mansion—you lived a life of solitude.

name: Highborn Snoop
description: The machinations and scheming of King's Crown have trained you to be on the lookout for those who seem out of place.

name: Hired Killer
description: Your life truly began after your first kill.

name: Historical Reenactor
source: Pathfinder Sky King's Tomb Player's Guide
description: To Clan Tolorr, history shouldn't be dry and boring; it deserves to be engaging and made relevant to the living.

name: Hookclaw Digger
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Little Trouble in Big Absalom
description: Prerequisites Kobold ancestry You are a digger from the Hookclaw kobold tribe, born beneath the streets of Absalom, with muscles and mind hardened by years spent tunneling through rock and earth and a confidence built upon your pride in your draconic heritage.

name: Hounded Thief
description: Some time ago, you stole a unique item from a strange individual.

name: Hunted by the Night
source: Pathfinder Shades of Blood Player's Guide
description: You're being hunted—by a vampire no less!

name: Hunter
description: You stalked and took down animals and other creatures of the wild.

name: Inexplicably Expelled
source: Pathfinder Outlaws of Alkenstar Player's Guide
description: Gaining admission to Blythir College is a difficult task, even for Alkenstar's most well-to-do families.

name: Inlander
description: Prerequisite Region - Absalom and Starstone Isle You grew up in an untamed region of the Isle of Kortos, and you know how to survive in the wild.

name: Insurgent
description: You were more than a rebel; you were a revolutionary, fighting for the promise of a new or better country.

name: Iolite Trainee Hobgoblin
source: Pathfinder Society Scenario #1-19: Iolite Squad Alpha
description: Prerequisites Hobgoblin Ancestry The Iolite Squad was Oprak's first foray into training hobgoblins for Pathfinder membership.

name: Issian Partisan
description: Prerequisite Region - Broken Lands You grew up among the northern houses of Brevoy in old Issia.

name: Issian Patriot
description: You grew up in northern Brevoy, but the call for heroes willing to help take back your country's rightful holdings in the Stolen Lands has inflamed your dreams of profit and possibilities, and you have joined an expedition journeying south.

name: Jeweler
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: As an artisan by trade, your materials of choice are precious metals and stones.

name: Junk Collector
description: You live by the adage that one person's trash is another's treasure.

name: Junker
description: You live on the outskirts of civilization, combing through the detritus left behind for interesting trinkets to sell or use in your own crafting.

name: Kaiju Stalker
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: The lands of Tian Xia can be as dangerous as they are beautiful, and like any land, it calls for hunters.

name: Kalistrade Follower
description: Prerequisite Region - Shining Kingdoms You follow the philosophy of the Prophecies of Kalistrade, seeking to build up your wealth in this life so that you might meet the next world on your own terms.

name: Keys to Destiny
description: From as far back as you can remember, it seems you were always meant to enter a specific industry or profession, be it artistry, engineering, farming, herbalism, labor, merchantry, scribing, theater, or warfare.

name: Knack for Contraptions
source: Pathfinder Shades of Blood Player's Guide
description: You've always liked to fiddle with things mechanical, anything from simple tools to more complex contraptions.

name: Kyonin Emissary
description: Prerequisite Region - Shining Kingdoms You were trained to be an ambassador of the elven land of Kyonin, and you have now been sent out into the wider world to build alliances between Kyonin and the neighboring kingdoms.

name: Laborer
description: You've spent years performing arduous physical labor.

name: Lastwall Survivor
description: Prerequisite Region - Eye of Dread You managed to escape the devastation that the Whispering Tyrant brought to your nation, but you lost everything to the lich-king's minions, including your home and many friends and family.

name: Learned Guard Prodigy
source: Pathfinder Agents of Edgewatch Player's Guide
description: For some, the nuts and bolts of keeping the peace are practically second nature.

name: Legacy of the Hammer
description: Your introduction to the criminal life was spurred forward by a seemingly innocuous hammer that provided you with all kinds of innovative criminal ideas.

name: Legendary Parents
description: [Legacy - Age of Ashes] One or more of your parents (either biological or adoptive) were heroes of the Age of Ashes Adventure Path.

name: Lesser Scion
source: Pathfinder Adventure: The Fall of Plaguestone
description: You are the youngest child in a noble house (in Cheliax, Isger, or Andoran) and stand to inherit nothing from your family.

name: Library Dweller
description: The library serves as your refuge from a world that isn't always welcoming or reasonable.

name: Local Brigand
description: You hail from the River Kingdoms or the more lawless reaches of Brevoy.

name: Local Scion
source: Pathfinder Age of Ashes Player's Guide
description: You're from Breachill and have lived there most, if not all, of your life.

name: Lost and Alone
source: Pathfinder Adventure: The Fall of Plaguestone
description: You were training to become a knight in Lastwall when the Whispering Tyrant escaped his imprisonment and destroyed the nation.

name: Lost Coast Local
source: Pathfinder Seven Dooms for Sandpoint Player's Guide
description: You've very likely lived in Sandpoint your whole life—if you haven't, then you've got family who does, and you've spent many months visiting them from your own home elsewhere on the Lost Coast.

name: Lost Loved One
description: You see your life as naturally divided into two chapters: in one, the love-limned, halcyon days of yesteryear, in the other, the day you lost the person most important to you, plus every aching moment thereafter.

name: Lumber Consortium Laborer
description: Prerequisite Region - Shining Kingdoms You have suffered as a worker for the unscrupulous Lumber Consortium, laboring under harsh conditions in dangerous wooded regions of Andoran.

name: Magaambya Academic
description: Prerequisite Region - Mwangi Expanse You studied magic at the prestigious Magaambya academy in Nantambu, learning magical traditions dating back to Old- Mage Jatembe and earning a pedigree respected by magical scholars almost everywhere.

name: Magical Experiment
description: At some point in your life, powerful people performed magical experiments on you that changed you permanently.

name: Magical Merchant
description: Selling magic items isn't like being an ordinary merchant.

name: Magical Misfit
description: You don't understand folks who claim that magical talent is some sort of burden or great responsibility; you've always used your magic to cause trouble and to escape the consequences.

name: Mammoth Herder
source: Pathfinder Quest for the Frozen Flame Player's Guide
description: You're adept at calming, wrangling, and living beside woolly mammoths and other megafauna commonly found in the Realm of the Mammoth Lords.

name: Mammoth Speaker
description: Prerequisite Region - Saga Lands You have learned the secrets of taming the mighty mammoths and other megafauna of the far north.

name: Mana Wastes Refugee
description: Prerequisite Region - Impossible Lands Exposure to the corrupting influence of the Mana Wastes' strange energies has warped your inner essence, resulting in unpredictable interactions with magic items and more than a little know-how about surviving under bizarre and adverse natural conditions.

name: Mantis Scion
description: Prerequisite Region - High Seas At least one of your parents is a member of the notorious Red Mantis assassins, merciless killers for hire who rarely fail to claim their marks.

name: Market Runner
description: Keeleno Lathenar, the proprietor of Otari Market, is a grim and bitter man.

name: Martial Disciple
description: You dedicated yourself to intense training and rigorous study to become a great warrior.

name: Mechanic
description: The intricate inner workings of machines are no stranger to you.

name: Mechanical Symbiosis
description: Whether you purposefully took it on or had it thrust upon you, a bronze, clockwork object latched onto some part of your body.

name: Medicinal Clocksmith
description: While others might have looked to clockwork as a mechanical innovation, you see the potential in the technology to improve the health of patients.

name: Megafauna Hunter
source: Pathfinder Quest for the Frozen Flame Player's Guide
description: Life is only as meaningful as its risks, and the risks you're willing to take are big indeed.

name: Menagerie Dung Sweeper
description: Prerequisite Region - Absalom and Starstone Isle Whether you washed warrior beasts below the Irorium's arena floor or tended to the mutated animals of a Puddle sideshow, you are experienced with all manner of weird wildlife.

name: Merabite Prodigy
description: Prerequisite Region - Golden Road Even in a city renowned for its alchemy, you were able to rise above the competition.

name: Merchant
description: In a dusty shop, market stall, or merchant caravan, you bartered wares for coin and trade goods.

name: Militia Member
source: Pathfinder Seven Dooms for Sandpoint Player's Guide
description: Although the official number of Sandpoint's town guards is only about a dozen, another two dozen people help to support the town garrison and the guards themselves.

name: Miner
description: You earned a living wrenching precious minerals from the lightless depths of the earth.

name: Missionary
source: Pathfinder Adventure: The Fall of Plaguestone
description: You received training from clergy in a faraway temple, who sent you out into the world to spread the faith.

name: Molthuni Mercenary
description: Prerequisite Region - Eye of Dread Whether you sought citizenship or simply needed a steady paycheck, you spent some of your time as a paid mercenary in the armed forces of Molthune, where you fought against Molthune's enemies such as Nirmathas or the Ironfang Legion.

name: Money Counter
description: The wealthiest of all the factions in Geb is the Tax Collectors Union, but it's the money counters in its banks and vaults that keep the numbers tallied.

name: Moot Guard
source: Pathfinder Wardens of Wildwood Player's Guide
description: You are a respected guardian of the Verduran Forest, and the Wildwood Lodge has called upon you to manage security at their upcoming Greenwood Gala.

name: Mortuarium Survivor
description: You studied the necromantic arts in the clawed tower of the Mortuarium, the most prestigious university of necromancy in Yled.

name: Musical Prodigy
description: Ever since you were young, you've been almost supernaturally skilled in a particular type of music.

name: Mystic Seer
description: You delight crowds by reading minds, telling futures, and contacting spirits.

name: Mystic Tutor
description: You spent years predicting, identifying, and harnessing the innate magical talents of those around you.

name: Necromancer's Apprentice
description: You apprenticed under a necromancer-a hard education in a field where a cadaver you were dissecting could suddenly animate and every magical artifact seemed deadly.

name: Newcomer
source: Pathfinder Seven Dooms for Sandpoint Player's Guide
description: You've only been in Sandpoint a short time, although what constitutes a "short time" depends on who you talk to.

name: Newcomer In Need
source: Pathfinder Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Player's Guide
description: You're a Gokan native in a bad spot, and you're going to need a miracle to get you out of your current fix.

name: Nexian Mystic
description: Prerequisite Region - Impossible Lands Your initiations into the Nexian mysteries and the philosophies of the Arclords of Nex grant you a preternatural comprehension of the arcane underpinnings of existence.

name: Night Watch
description: When everyone else slumbers, you're on guard.

name: Nirmathi Guerrilla
description: Prerequisite Region - Eye of Dread Woodcraft comes naturally to you, and you have learned how to use the forest to your tactical advantage against superior forces in skirmishes against the Molthuni army or the Ironfang Legion.

name: Noble
description: To the common folk, the life of a noble seems one of idyllic luxury, but growing up as a noble or member of the aspiring gentry, you know the reality: a noble's lot is obligation and intrigue.

name: Nocturnal Navigator
description: You have a great affinity for the night skies.

name: Nomad
description: Traveling far and wide, you picked up basic tactics for surviving on the road and in unknown lands, getting by with few supplies and even fewer comforts.

name: Northland Forager
source: Pathfinder Quest for the Frozen Flame Player's Guide
description: The vast tundra and looming mountains of the Realm of the Mammoth Lords may seem featureless and barren to the untrained eye, but you know better.

name: Northridge Scholar
source: Pathfinder Season of Ghosts Player's Guide
description: The political faction of Northridge is focused on modern pragmatism and urban growth.

name: Occult Librarian
description: Hours spent reading numerous compendiums dedicated to various occult topics honed your knowledge of these more obscure magical arts.

name: Ocean Diver
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originYou're one of the sea people, the divers who inhabit the rough shorelines.

name: Oenopion-Ooze Tender
description: Prerequisite Region - Impossible Lands Your apprenticeship in one of Oenopion's unorthodox arcane and alchemical academies instilled in you a deep reservoir of mostly reliable esoteric knowledge, not to mention a deep resentment born of countless hours spent mucking ooze pens and feeding helpless cr

name: Once Bitten
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: After an altercation with an undead creature, you feared you might be infected.

name: Onyx Trader
description: Prerequisite Region - Eye of Dread Oprak doesn't share the secrets of the Onyx Vault with many, but you are one of the lucky few to be permitted into the heart of the nation.

name: Osirionologist
description: Prerequisite Region - Golden Road Whether you're a fascinated outsider or a local proud of your nation's storied past, you're a devoted student of Osirion's history.

name: Osprey Barnraiser
description: A person cannot live on fish alone, which is why you work with Elder Bo'Mel on her farm.

name: Osprey Fisher
description: Fishing is Osprey Cove's number one profession, and you've apprenticed under the best of them: Elder Anlorgog.

name: Osprey Scion
description: You are the birth or adopted child of one of the five elders of Osprey Cove, and your parent or guardian volunteers you to accompany Elder Ordwi on her trip to Iron Harbor, hoping to get an unbiased account of events.

name: Osprey Scout
description: Though Osprey Cove is a quiet village, you've scouted the wilderness inland, watching for any dangerous wildlife or creatures in order to keep it that way.

name: Osprey Scribe
description: Either as a punishment or because of political ambition, you work for Elder Vandous.

name: Osprey Spellcaster
description: Whether by instinct or study, magic is one of your most notable talents.

name: Osprey Warrior
description: You'd always been the most athletic child of your play group, leading the other children in games of skill and strategy.

name: Otherworldly Mission
description: You're called to serve a specific purpose-your deity told you so, and so it must be true.

name: Out-Of-Towner
source: Pathfinder Age of Ashes Player's Guide
description: You've never been to Breachill, nor do you have roots in the town, but as chance has it you find yourself visiting.

name: Outrider
description: In your youth, you galloped on horseback over vast prairies, serving as a vanguard for your settlement, an army, or another group.

name: Outskirt Dweller
source: Pathfinder Season of Ghosts Player's Guide
description: While Willowshore is a lovely small town, even a population of 200 is a bit much for you.

name: Ozem Experience
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You or someone close to you worked with the Knights of Ozem before Lastwall fell.

name: Party Scholar
description: Perhaps because you already achieved what you wanted at school or your position makes you invulnerable, you've begun to pour your efforts into a lifestyle of hedonistic excess.

name: Pathfinder Hopeful
description: Prerequisite Region - Absalom and Starstone Isle You've long wanted to join the adventurous Pathfinder Society.

name: Pathfinder Recruiter
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: The Pathfinder Society's always on the lookout for talent, but that talent rarely just stumbles into the Grand Lodge.

name: Perfection Seeker
description: Prerequisite Region - Impossible Lands You aspire to perfect your body and mind in the tradition of Jalmeray's Houses of Perfection, honing your acrobatic skills and mental faculties in preparation for a lifetime pushing the edge of what most consider possible.

name: Pilgrim
description: In your youth, you made several pilgrimages to important shrines and sacred sites.

name: Pillar
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Not every Knight of Lastwall contributes to the crusade through combat.

name: Planar Migrant
description: Your birthplace was on one of the elemental planes, but you traveled to the Universe for some reason.

name: Plant Whisperer
description: You've always had a green thumb, allowing you to care for plants that others found too difficult to grow and tend with a skill that borders on the magical.

name: Political Scion
source: Pathfinder Agents of Edgewatch Player's Guide
description: Like your parents and your parents before them, you initially followed the long path toward politics from an early age.

name: Portal Scholar
description: Candlaron's legacy is one of the strongest elven legacies on Golarion and beyond, for it was he who first created the aiudara—the network of magical portals that link Kyonin to Castrovel and so many other locations across Golarion.

name: Post Guard of All Trades
source: Pathfinder Agents of Edgewatch Player's Guide
description: Not all cops are passionate about their jobs.

name: Press-Ganged (G&G)
description: Was that five shots or six?

name: Press-Ganged (LOWG)
description: Prerequisite Region - High Seas You were forced into service as a sailor against your will.

name: Printer
description: Keeping your finger on the pulse of the city, you write a small news broadsheet to sell on street corners.

name: Prisoner
description: You have been imprisoned or punished for crimes (whether you were guilty or not).

name: Professional Letter Writer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You make a living out of reading and writing letters for people who are eager to keep in touch with their loved ones over long distances.

name: Propaganda Promoter
description: The ghost king Geb has returned to a more active role in leading his nation after thousands of years, and it's shocking that some people in the nation haven't heard that.

name: Purveyor of the Bizarre
description: Prerequisite Region - Golden Road Whether in Katapesh or one of the bustling markets along the Path of Salt, you've spent enough time buying and selling ancient or unusual items to give you an instinctive ability to quickly sort valuable trinkets from worthless baubles.

name: Pyre Tender
description: You're experienced at building funeral pyres.

name: Quick
description: Prerequisite Region - Impossible Lands Staying alive among the scheming, ravenous undead of Geb required a deep knowledge of their motivations, capabilities, and weaknesses.

name: Quick Refugee
description: The living residents of Geb are known as the quick, and it is not, overall, a very pleasant thing to be.

name: Raised by Belief
description: Whether in a monastery, a religious household, or just as part of your everyday life, your upbringing was steeped in the traditions of a particular deity.

name: Ratted-Out Gun Runner
source: Pathfinder Outlaws of Alkenstar Player's Guide
description: Sure, you've got a checkered past.

name: Razmiran Faithful
description: Prerequisite Region - Broken Lands You serve a living god who rules upon the face of Golarion, and this gives your actions a divine mandate not to be trifled with.

name: Reborn Soul
description: You were given a second opportunity at life by mysterious forces in the Lands of Second Souls.

name: Reclaimed
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: A unit of Crimson Reclaimers saved you from certain death in the Gravelands.

name: Reclaimer Investigator
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You believe the mysterious patron of the Crimson Reclaimers has an ulterior motive that bedevils the Knights of Lastwall.

name: Refugee (Fall of Plaguestone)
source: Pathfinder Adventure: The Fall of Plaguestone
description: The fighting around the Lake Encarthan region has forced many of the people residing there to flee from the violence.

name: Refugee (PC2)
description: You come from a land very distant from the one you now find yourself in, driven by war, plague, or simply in the pursuit of opportunity.

name: Relentless Dedication
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Recruiters invite many candidates like you to train to be Knights of Lastwall, but only a select few make the cut.

name: Remittance Agent
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: When money, goods, or merchandise need to be moved over great distances, remittance agents are better and more trustworthy than your local mercenary.

name: Reputation Seeker
source: Pathfinder Age of Ashes Player's Guide
description: You're likely from Breachill, but unlike the Local Scion, your family has no notable legacy in the area.

name: Respected Mentor
description: While more career-minded peers consider dealing with students an annoyance and distraction from their own research, you're the rare exception who enjoys and finds fulfillment in educating and nurturing youths.

name: Returned
description: You died and miraculously returned with knowledge of the realms beyond death and a stronger link to life.

name: Returning Descendant
source: Pathfinder Age of Ashes Player's Guide
description: You aren't from Breachill yourself-you might not even be from Isger or Avistan at all.

name: Revenant
description: You died.

name: Rigger
description: You've worked as a roustabout to erect tents and set up rigging for acrobatic performances; you've sometimes even aided aerialists and acrobats in their death-defying training.

name: Rivethun Adherent
description: Prerequisite Region - Shining Kingdoms You have spent time learning the practices and traditions of the ancient Rivethun dwarven shamans and can recognize all sorts of magic.

name: Root Worker
description: Some ailments can't be cured by herbs alone.

name: Rostland Partisan
description: Prerequisite Region - Broken Lands You grew up among the southern houses of Brevoy in old Rostland.

name: Rostlander
description: You were raised in the south of Brevoy, a land of dense forests and rolling plains, of crystalline rivers and endless sapphire skies.

name: Royalty
description: You are a prominent member of a royal family.

name: Ruby Phoenix Enthusiast
description: Named for the legendary sorcerer Hao Jin, the Ruby Phoenix Tournament occurs once every 10 years in Goka and attracts extraordinary talent from across the world.

name: Ruby Phoenix Fanatic
source: Pathfinder Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Player's Guide
description: Have you heard of the peerless sorcerer Hao Jin, also known as the Ruby Phoenix?

name: Ruin Delver
description: You've looked through some of the smaller ruins in the Otari hinterlands but have never quite built up the courage to check out the creepy lighthouse called Gauntlight.

name: Runaway Noble
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: There are many reasons for noble blood to abandon their responsibilities.

name: Runelord Scholar
source: Pathfinder Seven Dooms for Sandpoint Player's Guide
description: It seems hard to believe that just 17 years ago, barely anyone knew anything about ancient Thassilon.

name: Runner
description: You served as a messenger for a specific faction, guild, house, or individual, often running those messages on a short timeline.

name: Saboteur
description: Whether you do it for personal enjoyment or at the behest of a mercenary company or military organization, you have a knack for destroying things.

name: Sailor
description: You heard the call of the sea from a young age.

name: Sally Guard Neophyte
loreSkill: Hunting Lore or Stabling Lore Lore
source: Pathfinder Agents of Edgewatch Player's Guide
description: You joined the Sally Guard, Westgate's guard precinct, at an early age, bringing with you the requisite steel armor, sword, and lance, though your gear is of dubious make.

name: Saloon Entertainer
description: All you want to do is entertain the people, but sure enough, bad news seems to follow you.

name: Sandswept Survivor
loreSkill: <Lore about a specific type of undead> Lore
source: Pathfinder Blog: Pathfinder Society Year 4 Rule Updates
description: You were in the Sandswept Hall, the Pathfinder Society's lodge in Sothis, Osirion, when it came under attack from an unrelenting horde of undead.

name: Sarkorian Reclaimer
description: Prerequisite Region - Broken Lands Whether you trace your heritage to lost Sarkoris or are a crusader trying to atone for past fanatics' wrongs, you seek to liberate the Sarkorian homeland from the demons who have defiled it.

name: Sarkorian Survivor
description: Prerequisite Region - Broken Lands The devastation and carnage of the Worldwound were nearly complete, but you somehow managed to survive it.

name: Saved by Clockwork
description: Through bloody combat, a terrible accident, or purposeful sacrifice, you've lost some piece of your body that has been replaced with a clockwork mechanism.

name: Savior of Air
loreSkill: Elemental Lords Lore or <Elemental Plane> Lore Lore
description: Upon securing the Untouchable Opal, an artifact of extraordinary power, the Pathfinder Society endeavored to free the benevolent demigod Ranginori, who was trapped within the virtually unbreakable prison.

name: Scarnetti-Connected
source: Pathfinder Seven Dooms for Sandpoint Player's Guide
description: There's no denying that the Scarnettis, once one of Sandpoint's most established and successful families, have fallen on hard times.

name: Scavenger
description: You've made a living sorting through the things society throws away.

name: Scholar
description: You have a knack for learning and sequestered yourself from the outside world to learn all you could.

name: Scholar of the Ancients
description: Prerequisite Region - High Seas You're fascinated by the lost Azlanti Empire and have dedicated yourself to seeking out and studying every broken artifact or scrap of knowledge that remains, whether as an academic pursuit or simply for the joy of treasure hunting.

name: Scholar of the Sky Key
description: The unfamiliar technology of Numeria's Silver Mount still baffles Society scholars, yet you are one of the innovators who discovered how to operate a handful of these futuristic tools-possibly after surviving more than a few explosions.

name: School Medic
description: Whether practicing as part of your course of study or serving on staff, you've been asked to help by a school concerned that Sarkoris's lessons might be too harsh for the visiting students.

name: Scion of Slayers
description: You were born into a lineage of undead slayers.

name: Scout
description: You called the wilderness home as you found trails and guided travelers.

name: Second Chance Champion
source: Pathfinder Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Player's Guide
description: You competed in the last Ruby Phoenix Tournament 10 years ago, though you didn't make it to the end.

name: Secular Medic
description: Prerequisite Region - Golden Road You're from Rahadoum, where the Laws of Mortality taught you to reject the gods, yet you've seen firsthand how dangerous it can be to go without healing magic.

name: Seer of the Dead
description: You have long been gifted with the ability to see and speak with the departed.

name: Self-Made
source: Pathfinder Triumph of The Tusk Player's Guide
description: Some are born with everything they need in this life, but not you—you scraped everything you have together through hard work and sheer force of will.

name: Senghor Sailor
description: Prerequisite Region - Mwangi Expanse As an experienced sailor from Senghor, you know that the only thing saving you from disaster on the high seas is a properly maintained ship.

name: Sense of Belonging
description: Home is all you've ever wanted.

name: Sentinel Reflectance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Either through witnessing their deeds and devout heroics firsthand, or through reading chronicles of their exploits, the Shining Sentinels of the Knights of Lastwall inspire you.

name: Servant
description: You held a role of servitude, waiting on nobles and engendering their trust as one of the confidantes of the household.

name: Sewer Dragon
source: Pathfinder Society Quest #10: The Broken Scales
description: Prerequisites Kobold Ancestry You are one of the Sewer Dragons, born in Absalom's sewers, strengthened by a life defending your territory.

name: Shadow Haunted
description: Prerequisite Region - Old Cheliax You are from Nidal, and regardless of your personal values, Zon-Kuthon has a claim on your soul due to an ancient pact.

name: Shadow Lodge Defector
description: You were among the Pathfinders recruited by the devious Shadow Lodge, lured in by promises of wealth, reform, justice, or revenge.

name: Shadow War Survivor
description: Countless factions have fought for influence in Absalom for millennia, and for decades these groups worked through the Pathfinder Society to better control the City at the Center of the World.

name: Sheriff
description: You hold an official title of sheriff or deputy in a small community.

name: Shielded Fortune
description: You've always been tougher than your peers.

name: Shoanti Name-Bearer
description: Prerequisite Region - Saga Lands You are a member of a Shoanti quah and have gone through its coming of age ceremony, gaining the traditional tattoo of your quah and earning your adult name.

name: Shory Seeker
description: You've dedicated your life to unraveling the secrets of the ancient Shory Empire, either through meticulous research or by traveling into dangerous and distant ruins to track down long-lost artifacts.

name: Sideshow Scion
description: Ah, the circus!

name: Sign Bound
description: You were born under a powerful manifestation of a specific constellation, and its connection to you is obvious.

name: Silk Farmer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originYou've studied and mastered the art of sericulture.

name: Sky Rider
description: The freedom of a bird in flight is something to envy, and envy it you did, but not for long.

name: Sleepless Suns Star
loreSkill: Gladatorial Lore or Genealogy Lore Lore
source: Pathfinder Agents of Edgewatch Player's Guide
description: Among your fellow guards who patrol the Foreign Quarter, you're something of a big deal.

name: Snubbed Out Stoolie
source: Pathfinder Outlaws of Alkenstar Player's Guide
description: You were once a distinguished informant for the shieldmarshals, working deep undercover to infiltrate gangs of bootleggers and assassins.

name: Sodden Scavenger
description: Prerequisite Region - Mwangi Expanse You've managed to eke out an existence in the storm-wracked Sodden Lands and have become an expert at scavenging food and tools.

name: Song of the Deep
description: During a sea voyage, you washed overboard, ingested sea water, and drowned.

name: Songsinger in Training
source: Pathfinder Quest for the Frozen Flame Player's Guide
description: You are a pupil of Argakoa the Songsinger, Otter House leader and Mammoth Lord.

name: Southbank Traditionalist
source: Pathfinder Season of Ghosts Player's Guide
description: The political faction of Southbank represents the original founders of Willowshore, a hearty band of settlers whose skills and focus tend toward the earthly and humble.

name: Spell Seeker
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Conventional magic can only hold your attention for so long.

name: Sponsored by a Stranger
source: Pathfinder Strength of Thousands Player's Guide
description: You remember the day the stranger approached you to make several peculiar inquiries.

name: Sponsored by a Village
source: Pathfinder Strength of Thousands Player's Guide
description: You come from a small community far from any large cities, but the Magaambya is known even in your isolated corner of the world.

name: Sponsored by Family
source: Pathfinder Strength of Thousands Player's Guide
description: Several members of your family have studied at the Magaambya, although not all of them have graduated as lore-speakers (or even advanced past initiates to become attendants).

name: Sponsored by Teacher Ot
source: Pathfinder Strength of Thousands Player's Guide
description: You have known the Magaambyan teacher Takulu Ot and his wife Niana for many years.

name: Spotter
description: An eye for detail, a sense for the wind, and a strong trust in your gut feelings.

name: Squire
loreSkill: Heraldry Lore or Warfare Lore Lore
description: You trained at the feet of a knight, maintaining their gear and supporting them at tourneys and in battle.

name: Star Athlete
description: Whatever the sport, be it basilisk, kickball, wrestling, footraces, stickball, canoeing, or foot volleyball, you either have played it or are keen to try it.

name: Stargazer
source: Pathfinder Shades of Blood Player's Guide
description: Ever since you were a child, you've looked up at the night sky and been filled with wonder by the host of celestial bodies that populate the cosmos.

name: Starless One
description: You were born on a night when not a single star was in the night sky.

name: Starwatcher
description: You're one of Wrin Sivinxi's closest confidantes.

name: Storm Survivor
description: Prerequisite Region - High Seas Through luck or through skill, you managed to survive a catastrophic maritime disaster, such as a shipwreck or being thrown overboard.

name: Story Collector
description: The power stories exude over the world has long fascinated you.

name: Street Preacher
description: Forget the church orthodoxy and the stuffy cloisters-spreading the word of your god to the people is your calling.

name: Street Urchin
description: You eked out a living by picking pockets on the streets of a major city, never knowing where you'd find your next meal.

name: Streetfood Vendor
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You're an inspired chef, trying to make it as big as you can out on the open road.

name: Student of Archery
description: Elves are known to be talented and gifted archers.

name: Student of Magic
description: You are currently enrolled at a school of magic, where you're learning the fundamentals of your magical tradition.

name: Student of the Ancients
source: Pathfinder Shades of Blood Player's Guide
description: Sure, stargazing is fine and all, but you signed up for the expedition to Ancorato so you could visit the remains of the ancient empire of Azlant.

name: Sun Dancer
description: You've been taught the Burning Mother's blessings could be invited through dances done under its presence, such as in welcoming the first rays of warmth in the spring.

name: Supportive Sponsor
description: You were responsible for caring for someone's needs, be it a sibling or other familial relation, a friend fallen on hard times, or someone who just needed a helping hand at a time when you were there to offer assistance.

name: Surge Investigator
description: From rivers that charm all who come near to forests that speak through dream messages, you have seen and studied many kinds of magical terrain.

name: Sword Scion
description: You have lived all your life in and around the city of Restov, growing up on tales of Baron Sirian Aldori and the exploits of your home's heroic and legendary swordlords.

name: Taldan Schemer
description: Prerequisite Region - Shining Kingdoms Whether willing or unwilling, you have been involved in the many cutthroat political intrigues within Taldor.

name: Tall Tale
description: You've ridden a tornado, lassoed a river, mooned a dragon under a full moon, and shot six zombies with one bullet.

name: Tapestry Refugee
description: Within her magnificent museum demiplane, the sorcerer Hao Jin extracted and preserved countless sites and cultures.

name: Tax Collector
description: Reviled but required, you were sent when taxes were due.

name: Teacher
description: You are incredibly knowledgeable, skilled, and perhaps even trained to teach children and adults about the world and its wonders.

name: Teamster
source: Pathfinder Adventure: The Fall of Plaguestone
description: You left your home a few months back for a life on the road, working for one caravan company and then another, always on the lookout for a new job and a better life.

name: Tech-Reliant
description: Some event, be it an accident, attack, or disaster, has left you horribly scarred by magic.

name: Thassilonian Delver
description: As archaeologists uncovered and explored ever-larger numbers of Thassilonian ruins, you were among the eager explorers who sought out the Runelords' ancient secrets.

name: Thassilonian Traveler
description: Prerequisite Region - Saga Lands You come from ancient Thassilon, one of the citizens that appeared out of time alongside the city of Xin-Edasseril.

name: Thrill-Seeker
description: You once survived a life-or-death situation and found it surprisingly exhilarating, so now you chase that feeling of invincibility you only get when dancing with death.

name: Thrune Loyalist
description: Prerequisite Region - Old Cheliax Despite the setbacks Cheliax has suffered recently, your loyalties lie with the devil-backed House Thrune.

name: Thuvian Unifier
description: Prerequisite Region - Golden Road You believe the city-states of Thuvia should be united into one nation under the rule of your home city (most commonly Aspenthar), and you're willing to do whatever it takes to make it happen.

name: Tide Watcher
description: Where you hail from, the ocean is the lifeblood of your community; knowing how it changes according to the moon was integral to everyday life.

name: Tiffin Box Deliverer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originKnown to some as a dabbawala, you work for a delivery service, delivering and returning sturdy tiffins with hardy lunches for those who can't afford to bring lunch with them on their morning commute.

name: Time Traveler
description: You come from a different time.

name: Tinker
description: Creating all sorts of minor inventions scratches your itch for problem-solving.

name: Tomb Born
description: Your parents conceived you for a fell purpose at a site tainted by death, like a wight's barrow, mass grave, or ossuary.

name: Total Power
description: Whether you desire simple security after a life of uncertainty or you're actually just a control freak, power over your own fate is the thing you've always wanted.

name: Touched by Dahak
description: [Legacy - Age of Ashes] As the manifestation of Dahak was destroyed, a shard of the dragon god's wrathful nature infused you, resulting in a violent temper, strange apocalyptic dreams, an obsession with dragon hunting, or some other touch of his influence.

name: Town Troublemaker
description: Every town has at least one of them: the person that everyone "knows" is a bad apple, a rascal, a mixer, or a fly in the ointment—the troublemaker.

name: Toymaker
description: You delight in making little trinkets for children of all ages, and seeing their faces light up thanks to one of your creations brings joy to your heart.

name: Trade Consortium Underling
description: Prerequisite Region - Absalom and Starstone Isle Your experience as a ledger-keeper for one of Absalom's trade guilds has made you a canny investor and shrewd entrepreneur.

name: Trade Representative
source: Pathfinder Triumph of The Tusk Player's Guide
description: You belong to a merchant guild, a vendor group, or some other trade organization where you're protected and ensured a fair deal so long as you do what's best for the group's interests.

name: Trailblazer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Uncharted realms have always intrigued you, and you've explored and mapped large territories in service to merchants, governments, or your own curiosity.

name: Translator
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: In your youth, you learned to transcribe books and translate scrolls to preserve knowledge or perhaps to aid wealthy merchants and politicians.

name: Traveling Gourmand
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originWith plenty of time to hone your culinary skill, you can make the most out of any dish you create.

name: Tree Friend
source: Pathfinder Wardens of Wildwood Player's Guide
description: You aren't a mere visitor or settler living on a woodland's outskirts; you're an avid inhabitant of the Verduran Forest or another verdant wilderness.

name: Truth Seeker
source: Pathfinder Age of Ashes Player's Guide
description: Whether you are a local or from out of town, you've heard rumors that Breachill's past contains a hidden secret.

name: Tyrant Witness
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: When Tar-Baphon broke free of Gallowspire, you saw him emerge.

name: Ulfen Raider
description: Prerequisite Region - Saga Lands You are an Ulfen warrior, feared among Avistan for the merciless and devastating raids your people once conducted along the shores.

name: Undercover Contender
source: Pathfinder Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Player's Guide
description: Gangsters and cheats seem as drawn to the Ruby Phoenix Tournament as piranhas to a bloody hippo, and you're dead set on making sure this tournament is as scandal-free as possible.

name: Undercover Lotus Guard
loreSkill: Art Lore and Underworld Lore Lore
source: Pathfinder Agents of Edgewatch Player's Guide
description: It's a well-known secret that for every playhouse in the Ivy District, there's an underground criminal element lurking somewhere in the shadows.

name: Undersea Enthusiast
description: Prerequisite Region - High Seas You love diving and exploring the world beneath the waves, and long periods of swimming have trained you to move easily through the water.

name: Undertaker
description: People die.

name: Union Representative
description: You might have fought for fairer ore distribution for the Metalmaker's Union, higher chef's pay in the Provisioners' Union, or better mercenary contracts for the Union of Axe and Coin.

name: Unremarkable
description: Your face is particularly unremarkable, even if your presence or actions may not be.

name: Unsponsored
source: Pathfinder Strength of Thousands Player's Guide
description: You have aspirations of attending the Magaambya academy of magic, but fate seemed to thwart you at every turn.

name: Ustalavic Academic
description: Prerequisite Region - Eye of Dread You were educated at a famed Ustalavic academy, such as the University of Lepidstadt or the Sincomakti School of Sciences, and received quality instruction in advanced concepts of mathematics, science, and engineering.

name: Varisian Wanderer
description: Prerequisite Region - Saga Lands You have spent your youth wandering the lands of Varisia and beyond among the brightly painted wagons of a Varisian caravan.

name: Verduran City Folk
source: Pathfinder Wardens of Wildwood Player's Guide
description: You hail from one of the few large settlements in or around the Verduran Forest, such as Bellis or Wispil.

name: Vidrian Reformer
description: Prerequisite Region - Mwangi Expanse You know that the only way your homeland of Vidrian can remain free from outside conquerors is by forging a strong and unified government.

name: Wandering Libertine
description: Receiving attention has always come easily to you, be it because of your good looks, your charming personality, your way with words, or something else entirely, yet you've never really settled down.

name: Wandering Preacher
description: While you once spoke to a small congregation in a ramshackle church, those days are behind you now.

name: Wanderlust
description: You've traveled the world for years in search of excitement and adventure.

name: Wanted Witness
source: Pathfinder Outlaws of Alkenstar Player's Guide
description: You saw something you shouldn't have, plain and simple.

name: Ward
description: When you were young, you became the ward of another house—boarded, fed, and educated, but never quite a part of the family.

name: Warded by Kami
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've lived among kami, gaining a wellspring of spiritual power found deep within the Forest of Spirits.

name: Warrior
description: In your younger days, you waded into battle as a mercenary, a warrior defending a nomadic people, or a member of a militia or army.

name: Waste Walker
description: Whether you grew up in the Mana Wastes, the deserts of northern Garund, or another similarly desolate place, you quickly learned that only the strong survive.

name: Weaver
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You're a skilled weaver, crafting your pieces either by hand or by loom.

name: Whispering Way Scion
description: Prerequisite Region - Eye of Dread Your family has long been associated with the enigmatic death cult known as the Whispering Way, which was recently responsible for the terrible devastation in the nation of Lastwall.

name: Wildwood Local
description: Prerequisite Region - Shining Kingdoms You might have been born and raised among the druids of the Verduran Forest, or you may have spent time among them as an adult and come to know their ways.

name: Willing Host
description: You speak to spirits only you can perceive: wispy shreds of lost souls, household guardians, ancestral spirits, and other entities.

name: Willowshore Urchin
source: Pathfinder Season of Ghosts Player's Guide
description: As with any settlement, not all of Willowshore's citizens are born into easy lives.

name: Winter's Child
description: Prerequisite Region - Saga Lands Your or one of your ancestors hails from Irrisen, and some spark of the icy region's magic has manifested itself within your bones.

name: Wish for Riches
description: On the night of the Missing Moment, you saw visions of fabulous riches in the gate before you.

name: Wished Alive
description: Once you were a simple construct or inanimate doll, but due to a deeply felt wish, either yours or another's, you came to life, and so you're now a living, breathing creature.

name: Witch Wary
description: Prerequisite Region - Saga Lands You have little love or trust for spellcraft and those who practice it, and have developed a paranoid knack for recognizing such tricks.

name: Witchlight Follower
description: While in a dismal forest or remote swamp, you caught sight of a string of lights bobbing through the trees.

name: Wonder Taster
description: Prerequisite Region - Broken Lands Having once sampled Numerian fluids, you've tasted knowledge beyond comprehension.

name: Wood Warden
source: Pathfinder Wardens of Wildwood Player's Guide
description: For all their thorns, beasts, and hazards, the wilds aren't invulnerable.

name: Working Student
description: Many students look to education as a means of improving their lives.

name: Writ in the Stars
description: Destiny has always intrigued you.

name: Zodiac Bound
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Fortune tellers and oracles claim that a person's zodiac sign influences their personality and fate, and while it might not be true for all, it seems true for you.
